Welcome to the company

Banshidhar Infratech

We are an organization solely dedicated to rental services for medium and large heavy-duty hydraulic telescopic, crawler cranes, and tower cranes — capacity 20T to 450T, plus boom lifts from 40 to 210 ft.

The company has a registered office in Patna, with 8+ years of experience and 5+ operational sites across India.

We provide rental services to major heavy industries — Power, Cement, Steel, Refinery, and Metro projects. Today, Banshidhar Infratech is a major player in heavy lift projects.

Services we're offering

Our Services

From foundation engineering to elevated-access rentals — engineered execution backed by 8+ years of operational experience.

Piling Foundation Services

Full-spectrum pile foundation services tailored to soil conditions and load requirements.

Piling Rig Rental Services

Premium hydraulic rotary piling rigs delivered with experienced operators.

Boom Lift Rental Services

JLG boom lifts from 40 ft to 210 ft for safe access at height.

Piling Rig Contractor

Turnkey piling contractor services with single-point project accountability.
